key_metrics: Gross Margin: $43.72 billion (46.5% of total net sales)
Share Repurchases: $21.17 billion in the quarter
qoq_changes: Cash and cash equivalents increased to $36.27 billion from $29.94 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year.
Total assets decreased to $331.50 billion from $364.98 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year.
Total current liabilities decreased to $141.12 billion from $176.39 billion at the end of the prior fiscal year.
new_risks: Specific risk factor details (Item 1A) were not included in the provided financial tables excerpt.
management_tone: Bullish, driven by strong nearly double-digit YoY growth in both total revenue and net income, anchored by a highly profitable and rapidly expanding Services segment.
analyst_note: Apple delivered a robust Q3 2025, demonstrating resilient top-line growth with Services continuing to act as a major high-margin growth engine. The company's ability to expand gross margins while aggressively returning capital to shareholders via $21.1 billion in quarterly share repurchases highlights exceptional operational execution.
